  assert_true: 'y-end span-self-x-end' is a supported value for position-area. expected true got false
[FAIL] Property position-area value 'span-self-x-end span-y-start'
  assert_true: 'span-self-x-end span-y-start' is a supported value for position-area. expected true got false

  assert_true: 'span-y-start span-self-x-end' is a supported value for position-area. expected true got false

  assert_true: 'span-self-x-end span-y-end' is a supported value for position-area. expected true got false
